description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated human figure, likely male, dressed in historical attire reminiscent of an 18th-century military or naval officer, complete with a tricorn hat and a long coat. The figure is positioned with legs spread and arms resting on the knees, exuding a relaxed yet dignified posture. The surface of the sculpture is metallic and appears roughly textured, with visible folds and creases in the clothing, adding to the realism and character of the piece. The facial features are somewhat abstracted but suggest a bearded visage. The entire figure sits atop a rounded base, which blends into the lower part of the coat. The coloration is predominantly silvery-gray, giving the impression of cast metal, possibly aluminum or bronze.
description: A metallic sculpture of a seated historical figure in a tricorn hat and long coat, with a rough silvery-gray finish. The figure sits with legs apart and arms resting on the knees, exuding a dignified presence.
description_view_0: Side view showing the figure's profile, the tricorn hat, and the detailed folds of the coat, with one leg and arm clearly visible.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the face, tricorn hat, both arms resting on the knees, and the symmetrical spread of the legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, showing the other profile, the back of the coat, and the figure's posture from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the tricorn hat, the coat's draping, and the rounded base supporting the figure.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figure in historical attire
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
